title: Non-resident registration and security enquiries - Canada.ca
content:
## Non-resident registration and security enquiries

## Important information for individuals with a temporary SIN starting with 9
If your temporary Social Insurance Number (SIN) starts with 9, you must use Business Registration Online (BRO) to register and instantly get a business number (BN) and CRA program accounts. For more information, see: Important information for individuals with a temporary SIN starting with 9 .
This listing for enquiries applies to:
- Make a non-resident registration and security enquiry
- GST/HST and QST rebate for conventions
- Import-export program account
If your SIN starts with 0, and you need to register for a GST/HST program account, go to Register as a non-resident doing business in Canada and use the Non-resident Business Registration online form.
For more information on registering, go to the Non-Resident Registration and Security Program .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
